form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr1) over 1790m at this track, at the bell was 10th-19.4 beaten 18 m by Rocking Wroxton (2:14.80) in NR up to 39 on April 7 at $31. Two runs back 3rd (Fr1) over 2190m at this track, at the bell was 2nd-4.6 beaten 11 m by Nevs Dream (2:44.80) in NR up to 46 on March 27 at $71. This will be too tough.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Bettorsweetvictory at Bendigo over 1650m in a NR up to 40 on March 25 at $61. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Olly Odd Potts at Kilmore over 1690m in a NR up to 35 on April 2 at $2.60. May prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Returns after three-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 6 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Miki Mark at this track over 2190m in a NR up to 49 on December 30 at $16. Could be primed for a big run.
